text.value:
DELETE t
FROM dbo.MasteryCriteria t
JOIN dbo.LearningProcessAttributes lp ON t.LearningProcessAttributesId = lp.id
JOIN dbo.BehaviorTracking bt ON bt.LearningProcessAttributesId = lp.id
JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON bt.childProfileId = cp.id
JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
**/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.MedicaidIdNumbers t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE

        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1

DELETE t
FROM dbo.MemberAccountHistory t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.AccountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.OccurrenceLateEntries t
INNER JOIN dbo.hcAppointments ha ON t.AppointmentId = ha.AppointmentId
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON ha.clientId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID

INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

DELETE t
FROM dbo.PhaseChange t
JOIN dbo.tblMember m ON m.ID = t.MemberId
JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON m.accountInfoId = a.ID
JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

DELETE t
FROM dbo.RTAResources t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.AccountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
